claim: A1 edge-adjacency operator on V600 has nine eigenvalues with multiplicities (1 4 9 16 25 36 9 16 4) summing to 120
starting_constraints: 600-cell adjacency graph fixed by Coxeter construction
comparison_target: Exact algebraic match to characteristic polynomial of A1
falsification_condition: A 10th eigenvalue or any multiplicity mismatch

claim: Closure operator C_phi = L + phi^-2 I = (12+phi^-2) I - A1 induces 94 + 13 + 13 sigma-pairing on the 120 vertices
starting_constraints: Definition of L and C_phi on V600
output: sigma-fixed subspace dimension 94 and two sigma-paired blocks of 13
falsification_condition: Pairing not summing to 120 or not 94+13+13

claim: Schlaefli / right-coset decomposition of V600 = 2T cdot {g^k}
output: V600 = bigsqcup 2T g^k over five cosets
falsification_condition: A non-coset structure or wrong index

claim: Every totally positive Z[phi]-prime is in the image of N_H
starting_constraints: Icosian order I_max with norm form N_H
v600_or_closure_role: N_H is the universal representation form
falsification_condition: A totally positive Z[phi]-prime that is not in image of N_H

claim: r(pi) = 8(1 + N_Q(pi)) for odd Z[phi]-primes pi and r(2) = 24 (Jacobi anomaly)
falsification_condition: Any prime with a count not matching formula

claim: L(Theta_I s) = zeta_K(s) zeta_K(s-1) C_2(s) where K = Q(sqrt 5) and C_2(s) = 1 - 2 cdot 2^-s + 2^(2-2s)
falsification_condition: Any Dirichlet coefficient disagreement

claim: 24-cell / 600-cell spectral bridge with E_4 multiplicity 25 corresponding to lambda_L = 12
starting_constraints: Two regular polytopes and their adjacency
falsification_condition: Spectrum disagreement under direct computation

claim: r_p = 4 lambda-bar_p (proton charge radius)
v600_or_closure_role: Sets length scale via rung-4 identification
output: r_p prediction at 0.04 percent of CODATA r_p
falsification_condition: CODATA r_p deviates from 4 lambda-bar_p by > 0.5 percent
open_gap: closure of H-RP across other hadronic radii

claim: Neutron and pion radii from same length scale
output: Predicted radii consistent within stated tolerance
falsification_condition: Any radius deviates from substrate prediction by > 1 percent
open_gap: extending to heavy mesons and baryons

claim: Deuteron coupling factor (6 + alpha)
falsification_condition: Coupling deviates from (6+alpha) at > 2 sigma

claim: Seven cosmological observables (Lambda H_0 Omega_Lambda etc.) within 0.5 percent of Planck 2018 inferred values
v600_or_closure_role: Closure dynamics fix the seven observables jointly
no_substrate_baseline: LambdaCDM (6-parameter fit) reaching same precision with more inputs
falsification_condition: Any of the seven observables deviates from Planck > 0.5 percent

claim: alpha^-1 = 137 + pi/87 under six-hypothesis stack (clay-bar alpha-chain)
falsification_condition: CODATA alpha^-1 disagrees with 137 + pi/87 at quoted precision

claim: 13 particle masses from cascade rung selection (paper-xviii)
no_substrate_baseline: Per-particle mass fit (12 free parameters for 13 masses)
falsification_condition: Any mass disagrees with substrate prediction at > 2 sigma

claim: Cortical phase under propofol: t = 7.11 on ds005620 sLORETA t = 9.72 (14/14 channels)
falsification_condition: Test statistic falls below threshold under cross-cohort replication

claim: Cross-cohort replication on ds004541: t = 5.25 (7/7 channels)
starting_constraints: Out-of-sample test of same closure prediction
falsification_condition: t < 2 on cross-cohort

claim: BETSE 6-condition planarian panel and five pre-registered wet-lab predictions
v600_or_closure_role: Closure on bioelectric substrate produces 5 predictions
falsification_condition: Any pre-registered wet-lab prediction fails on independent replication

claim: 18/18 preregistered hits after methodology refinement (17/18 before refinement)
falsification_condition: A new preregistered ARIA test fails

claim: Volatile inhaled anaesthetics Spearman rho = +0.94 (n = 11)
falsification_condition: Replication on a new n >= 11 cohort gives rho < 0.5

claim: X exists iff C(X) = X
falsification_condition: N/A (interpretation)

claim: Recurrence: substrate as cosmological-scale dynamic
falsification_condition: N/A (interpretation)
